QA Demo Test Reports

Latest Allure reports published from CI on the master branch.

  • Selenide E2E (mocked backend)
  • Selenide Accessibility (mocked backend)
  • Selenide UAT (full stack)
  • Playwright E2E (mocked backend)
  • Playwright Accessibility (mocked backend)
  • Playwright UAT (full stack)
Reports are updated independently after each workflow completes.
